# Extracao: blogpost-3

- **Fonte:** blogpost-3.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

First of all, my FAQ post that I put up yesterday
had a big "OOPS" in it... I had a bad "launch"
date in there - I typed in "November" instead of
"October". The correct launch date is:

October 18th at noon eastern time


As I type this, that is less than 48 hours away!

So what's the big deal about our launch date
anyway?

Well, we have put together an outrageous offer for
you, but many of our amazing bonuses are extremely
limited... they will go away quickly once we go
"live".

For instance, there is the "Winner's Weekend"...
an all expense paid trip to a five star resort to
spend two days with Dan Kennedy and myself (Bill
Glazer) where we will work on your business in a
small-group setting.

That is just one out of a list of about 19
different bonuses (I say "about" because we have
been constantly adding to the list.)

But like I said above, these bonuses are limited -
they are going to go quickly once we get to launch
day.

ONE MORE THING: About that "Graduation Gift"... a
lot of people have been asking about this.

This is the deal - once you complete your course
(including the integrated tests), then I will send
you a Graduation Gift of $500.00 cash.

Why so generous?

Well, I designed this to be an IMPLEMENTATION
program... I want to make sure you complete the
course. I am sick of hearing about all those other
copywriting programs that people never get around
to opening.

It's really pretty simple, I know that if you go
through the course and start to get the amazing
results that I have seen with this copywriting
system, well then you are going to become a raving
fan of mine... and a client for life.

So I decided to give you a great big incentive to
make sure you complete the course. 

It's simple common sense, and it makes great
business sense. I can't believe no one else is
doing this.
